rows.notes: Clear centered year at top of page, underlined. Very legible numerals.

rows.description: Computus Rectoria a 2d die Novembris A.D. 1859 ad eundem diem revolution d.d. 1860
rows.notes: Long Latin heading across top. Some abbreviations (2d, A.D., d.d.) are slightly stylized but readable; no monetary values present.
Section title (Recepte/Receipts) clearly written and underlined; no amounts.
Surname 'Clutterbuck' and '8th Inst on Loan' legible. Single '10' clearly aligned in the pounds column; no shillings/pence shown.
Surname 'Andrews' and abbreviation '4 do on do' visible. '30' sits squarely in the pounds column; description punctuation abbreviated but meaning clear.

Description 'Bushey' and 'Divd' (dividend) read with moderate uncertainty. Numeric '8' and '6' align in the shillings and pence columns respectively; no pounds shown. Ink slightly lighter on the description causing some uncertainty.

Large amount clearly aligned as 1308 pounds, 6 shillings, 7 pence. Handwriting of the descriptive surnames is slightly ornate (Burnar/ Burnsor / Interm. Domus uncertain in exact spelling) but the numeric columns are unambiguous and validate correctly.
Repeated 'Do.' entry (same account) with a clear numeric 1986 in pounds column and a '7' in pence column; middle column shows '0' shillings. Alignment with other totals confirms column boundaries.
Description 'Deans Fees' is clear. Amount '77 13 4' is crisply written and aligns perfectly under the £ s d rulings; all values within valid ranges.

rows.description: Divd. on Mr Jones consols recd Mint '58
rows.notes: Phrase interpreted as 'Divd. on Mr Jones consols recd M? '58'; handwriting for the trailing words is slightly cramped. Monetary columns (17/2/9) are clearly placed in pounds/shillings/pence respectively.
Description reads as New Building Fund with 'Aust (Closed)' appended; slightly abbreviated but legible. Amount '154 13 9' is clearly aligned and within valid ranges.

rows.description: Late Building Fund not carried to a/c etc
rows.notes: Description 'Late Building Fund not carried to a/c' readable though trailing words a little faint. Numerals '47' and '1' clearly fall into pounds and shillings columns; no pence figure is present.
Description 'Dr Richards Divinity Prize' mostly legible though 'Dr.' and name spacing are compact. Single '10' in pounds column is clear; no shillings/pence.
Description reads 'Hope Rent Miss Jones Share' with good legibility. Amount '11 8 6' is clearly aligned under £ s d columns.
Description 'Sixteen per cent on Rents' readable. Numeric '738 11 8' is clearly placed and all subunits valid; slight flourish on the '7' but alignment consistent with other rows.
Phrase 'Composition to Colby by Master' readable though the final word is slightly abbreviated. Numbers '332' and '10' align to pounds and shillings; no pence entered.

rows.description: Overplus Room Rent Xmas 1858 & do 1859 Rates
rows.notes: Description referencing 'Room Rent Xmas 1858 & do 1859' is legible. Numeric '7 11' occupies pounds and shillings columns; no pence shown. Slight ink faintness on description but amounts are clear.

rows.description: Repayment of money borrowed by Rath(?) from Cantion Fund (Principal 30 Interest 7/4/5)
rows.notes: Description is partially obscured and contains bracketed principal/interest notes; surname/word after 'borrowed by' is uncertain ('Rath' ambiguous). Final combined amount '37 4 5' is visible and aligned but surrounding annotations required interpretation, so confidence lowered.
Reads as a repayment from the Choir Fund. Single '9' in the pounds column is clear; no shillings/pence entered.
Line appears to note sale of '2000 Consols' (handwritten 'Consols'); amount '1910 19 8' is clearly written in the £ s d columns and validates numerically.
Short description 'Hammond Key' (surname and word 'Key' uncertain). A lone '1' is visible in the pounds column; no shillings/pence. Description legibility moderate.
Surname 'Allnutt' readable; the following word (payer) is faded/abbreviated ('Barrow' is a plausible reading). Numeric '5' in pounds column is clear; no shillings/pence.
Reads as 'Sub Rector repayment Instruction Choir' (minor spelling/spacing uncertainty). '30' is clearly in the pounds column; no shillings/pence.
Final total at bottom right reads clearly as '6726 11 7'. Vertical rules make £ s d columns unambiguous; digits are bold and legible.
